subtitle: Sign in to your account
missing_credentials: Please enter your username and password
no_account_message: Your SSO identity is not linked to any account. Please ask an administrator to create one for you.
error_auth_failed_message: SSO authentication failed. Please retry or contact an administrator.
error_account_disabled_message: Your account is disabled. Please contact an administrator.
error_account_pending_message: Your account is pending admin review. Please try again later.
error_sso_message: An error occurred during SSO sign-in. Please retry or contact an administrator.
error_sso_conflict_message: This account is already bound to a different SSO identity. Ask an administrator to clear the existing binding before signing in with the new SSO.
error_default_message: An error occurred during sign-in. Please retry or contact an administrator.
redirect_pending_body: You will be sent to your identity provider in a moment…
logged_out_message: You have been signed out successfully. Click below to sign in again. This browser keeps no login state until you do.
locked: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in about {{minutes}} min.
forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your username and we'll email you a password reset
forgot_password_success: If that account exists, a reset email is on its way. Please check your inbox.
reset_password_subtitle: Choose a new password for your account
reset_password_success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
reset_password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match
reset_password_invalid_token: This reset link or code is invalid or has expired
reset_password_error: Could not reset the password. Please try again.
password_too_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a letter and a digit
register_success: Account created. You can now sign in.
register_check_email: Almost done! Check your email to verify your address and activate the account.
register_verify_hint: We'll email you a verification link to activate your account.
register_email_exists: An account with this email already exists
register_email_domain_not_allowed: This email domain is not allowed for registration
register_error: Could not create the account. Please try again.
verify_email_success: Email verified. Your account is active — you can now sign in.
verify_email_invalid_token: This verification link or code is invalid or has expired
verify_email_error: Could not verify the email. Please try again.
twofa_prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
twofa_code_hint: You can also enter a one-time recovery code.
twofa_session_expired: Your 2FA session expired. Please sign in again.
twofa_recovery_prompt: Enter one of your one-time recovery codes to finish signing in.
twofa_email_prompt: Enter the one-time code sent to your email to finish signing in.
twofa_email_sent: A verification code has been sent to your email.
twofa_email_failed: Couldn't send the code. Please try again later.
twofa_passkey_prompt: Click the button below to verify with your passkey.
passkey_failed: Passkey sign-in failed. Try again or use your password.
